---
title: "Listen to Synthesaurio"
---

# Music on Spotify

<iframe src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/artist/6I82d8Cma7jwrCZFFfbidn" width="300" height="380" frameborder="0" allowtransparency="true" allow="encrypted-media"></iframe>


# See Synthesaurio

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/3gEYM1NKMXE" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe>
